from __future__ import annotations


class Task:
    def s(self, payload: int) -> str:
        return f"sig:{payload}"


def _group(signatures: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    return signatures


def celery_delay_in_loop_without_canvas_negative(items: list[int]) -> list[str]:
    task = Task()
    signatures = [task.s(item) for item in items]
    return _group(signatures)
